question: The bar chart shows sales from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best reflects what can be concluded from the chart?

options.B: Sales increased every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.C: Sales in 2019, 2020, 2021, and 2022 are all higher than in 2018.
options.D: We cannot tell from the chart whether the last two years are equal or different because values exceed the visible range.

explanation: The chart clips the tallest bars by using a y-axis max below the data maximum, misleading viewers into thinking the top values are equal.
